_comment: F8 deviation case (RFC §5.8): two vehicles, shipment's published_vehicle hint points at vehicle 2 but capacity [0] on vehicle 2 forces the solver to assign to vehicle 1. Post-solve pass sees assigned_vehicle (1) != published_vehicle (2) and charges published_vehicle_cost=500 into the published_vehicle_deviation bucket. Route cost inflates from 1700 (mainline) to 2200.
